posts.author: Kaitlin_Vane_84
posts.text: Has anyone else seen these weird posts about my routine? They keep listing when I clock in at 7am and mention my shift supervisor's name. It feels like someone is trying to expose me. Please check if this is a coordinated attack.
posts.explanation: The post shows signs of brigading by publishing private work details, which requires specialist review to confirm harassment intent and scope.
